releaseNotes:
v0.22 — performance + UX polish:

• Dashboard is faster on pharmacies with 200+ bottles. The list no longer re-sorts and re-filters on every notifier tick (was the main source of jank during sync polls).

• Background drug-name lookups from the FDA database now run in parallel (5 at a time) instead of serially. A startup sweep on a pharmacy with 50 unknown bottles is ~5x faster.

• Edit-bottle dialog now picks up FDA results that come in WHILE the dialog is open, so opening Edit on a freshly-scanned unknown bottle no longer leaves you with empty Name/Dose fields.

• Touch targets on "Mark Pulled" and "−1" are now bigger and have more space between them — fewer mis-taps when scanning fast.

• Bottle-row chips now show warnings (Below PAR, Note) on the LEFT so the eye lands on actionable signals first.

• Sync heartbeats no longer pull the full device roster every 30 seconds — only when Settings → Active devices or Diagnostics is open.

Under the hood: dropped a dead database table from the v0.20 cloud-folder days, removed orphaned Drive sync code, standardized how the daily expiration sweep records audit entries across devices.
